_comment: Maps a known Zoho accountId to its deployment folder slug — purely a cache so repeat customers reuse their existing folder instead of a new one being created every run. One rule, no exceptions: accountId found here -> use the mapped slug. accountId not found here -> auto-create a fresh folder (new slug, data.json, index.html, dashboard entry) using accountName from list_accounts, then add the new mapping here. No manual resolution step for anyone.
